title: Ayddar Nylykerka
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=GFFA |image= |name=Ayddar Nylykerka |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Tammarian]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] *[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Ayddar Nylykerka''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Tammarian]] fleet tracking officer who was responsible for discovering the [[Black Fleet]] and became the head of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet's]] [[Asset Tracking]] Office during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He also played an instrumental role in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] as [[Director of Fleet Intelligence|Director]] of [[New Republic Fleet Intelligence]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|I have heard...your people's most powerful fears involve being in standing water. I confess that such fears are completely alien to me. Yet you willingly entered the lake in an effort to see me.''"
"''Y-Yes I thought it was my d-duty.|[[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] and Ayddar Nylykerka|''[[Before the Storm]]''}} In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]] Nylykerka was the officer responsible for analyzing [[AK031995]], the data retrieved from the destroyed hulk of [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] ''[[Gnisnal]]'' by the [[Steadfast (carrier)|''Steadfast'']]. After realizing the treasure contained within the datafile—a complete, albeit ten-year-old, Imperial Order of Battle—Nylykerka risked life and limb to bring the information to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar's]] private estate, braving total submersion in water, a true feat considering his species' innate aversion to it. He was then chosen to explain to New Republic High Command the information the data highlighted regarding the [[Black Fleet]] and the likely strength of the [[Yevetha]]n forces who had obtained it. Following his work during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], Nylykerka was promoted to chief analyst of his office. In the early stages of the Yuuzhan Vong Invasion, he led efforts to track and analyze any information on the enemy, working alongside such luminaries as [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] Deputy Director [[Belindi Kalenda]], [[Etahn A'baht]] and [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Turk Brand|Brand]]. Nylykerka was involved to a small degree in the defection of the traitor [[Elan]]. As the invasion wore on, Nylykerka was promoted to [[Director of Fleet Intelligence|Director]] of [[New Republic Fleet Intelligence]]. In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], with the help of [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] and other facets of Intelligence, he orchestrated the dissemination of information to the Yuuzhan Vong and [[Peace Brigade]] spy network, deluding them into thinking that [[Ebaq 9]] was a target ripe for opportunity. ==Appearances== *''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Shield of Lies]]'' *''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' ==Sources== *''[[Diplomatic Corps Entrance Exam]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{StartBox}} {{SuccessionBox |title=[[Director of Fleet Intelligence|Director]] of [[New Republic Fleet Intelligence]] |years=? ABY–[[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]] |before=General [[Grif]] |after= }} {{EndBox}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Ayddar Nylykerka |es=Ayddar Nylykerka }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nylykerka, Ayddar}} [[Category:Males]] [[Category:New Republic Defense Fleet officers]] [[Category:Tammarians]]
